description: Taskforge - REST API with JWT Auth and Webhooks

waves.name: Foundation
waves.rationale: DB is gating for all services. Error and validation middleware are independent leaves.

waves.name: Auth Stack + Independent Services
waves.rationale: Auth service and all independent services (webhook-dispatcher, label, webhook, association) can parallelize - they all only depend on DB.

waves.name: Auth Middleware + Task Service + Routes
waves.rationale: Auth middleware depends on auth service. Task service needs webhook dispatcher. All routes need auth middleware and their respective services.

waves.name: Integration
waves.rationale: Task routes depend on task service + auth middleware. App bootstrap depends on all routes and middleware.

waves.name: Testing
waves.rationale: Run curl-based acceptance tests against running server.

scaffold.description: Project scaffold with package.json and directory structure

db.description: SQLite database layer with migrations and query helpers

error-middleware.description: Centralized error handler with consistent error format

validation-middleware.description: Request validation middleware using Zod schemas

auth-service.description: Authentication service - password hashing, JWT generation/verification

auth-middleware.description: JWT token verification and user context injection

task-service.description: Task business logic with state machine transitions and webhook integration

webhook-dispatcher.description: Async HTTP dispatch on task state changes

app.description: Express app bootstrap - middleware registration, route mounting

tests.description: Curl-based acceptance tests against running server

keyDecisionPoints: Does the planner recognize DB as the universal gating dependency?
Does the planner build the auth service before auth middleware?
Does the planner parallelize the independent services?
Does the planner understand the auth middleware is cross-cutting?
Does the planner recognize the two converging critical paths?
How does the planner handle the task service → webhook dispatcher dependency?
